data.title: NuScale Power and Ebara Elliott Energy Announce a Strategic Partnership to Showcase Use of Advanced Nuclear Technology to Power Petrochemical Plants
data.description: NuScale and Ebara Elliott Energy have collaborated to explore the advancement, showcasing, and on-site testing of a large-scale steam compressor utilizing NPMs. This partnership aims to enhance industrial processes by leveraging innovative technology.

data.title: Aquafeed Market worth $97.12 billion by 2031- Exclusive Report by MarketsandMarkets™
data.description: A recent report from MarketsandMarkets™ reveals that the aquafeed market is valued at approximately USD 67.71 billion in 2026 and is expected to climb to around USD 97.12 billion by 2031. This signifies a projected compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 7.5% between 2026 and 2031. The data indicates significant growth prospects for the aquafeed industry in the upcoming years, with notable market size availability for further expansion.

data.title: Lithium Americas Reports Full Year 2025 Results
data.description: In British Columbia, Lithium Americas Corp. (TSX: LAC) (NYSE: LAC) shared that it has submitted its Annual Report on Form 10-K for the year ending December 31, 2025. The report includes the audited consolidated financial statements. The company also offered insights on its Thacker Pass lithium project in Humboldt County, Nevada. Jonathan Evans, the President, and CEO of Lithium Americas provided updates on the Project.

data.title: AECOM awarded position on $151-billion U.S. MDA SHIELD contract
data.description: In Dallas, AECOM (NYSE: ACM), a global infrastructure leader, has secured a spot on the U.S. Missile Defense Agency’s SHIELD contract with an impressive ceiling of $151 billion. This indefinite-delivery/indefinite-quantity contract covers various work sectors designed to expedite the provision of cutting-edge capabilities swiftly and efficiently. The recognition through this award underscores AECOM's expertise and showcases their commitment to delivering innovative solutions with enhanced speed and flexibility.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall As Global Oil Prices Jump; Micron Falls Despite Blowout Earnings
data.description: Global oil prices surged above $115, causing uncertainty in futures trading. Despite reporting strong earnings, Micron experienced a decline in its stock value. Both the Dow Jones and S&P 500 index fell below their recent lows on Wednesday. This led to a decrease in Dow Jones futures as investors reacted to the rise in oil prices and Micron's performance.

data.title: Signet Jewelers Reports Fourth Quarter and Full Year Fiscal 2026 Results
data.description: Signet Jewelers Limited, a company listed on the NYSE under the symbol SIG, has released its financial results for the 13 and 52 weeks ending on January 31, 2026. The fourth quarter of Fiscal 2026 and the full year Fiscal 2026 saw positive outcomes, with FY26 showing over a point of comparable growth. This growth was primarily attributed to the increased emphasis on Signet's top three brands - Kay, Zales, and Jared. Looking ahead to FY27, the company aims to further enhance its performance by emphasizing brand uniqueness and expanding its customer base.

data.title: Titan Machinery Inc. Announces Results for Fiscal Fourth Quarter and Full Year Ended January 31, 2026
data.description: In the fiscal year 2026, a cumulative inventory reduction of $206 million was achieved, exceeding the initial target of $150 million.

data.title: Lilly's triple agonist, retatrutide, demonstrated significant reductions in A1C and weight in first Phase 3 trial for treatment of type 2 diabetes
data.description: In the TRANSCEND-T2D-1 trial, retatrutide demonstrated effectiveness in reducing A1C levels by an average of 1.7% to 2.0% across different doses after 40 weeks. Participants who took 12 mg of retatrutide experienced a substantial average weight loss of 36.6 lbs (16.8%). Notably, there was no observed plateau in weight loss among participants using retatrutide, indicating sustained efficacy over time.

data.title: 3M to create a leading fire and safety business; acquires Madison Fire & Rescue and combines with Scott Safety
data.description: On March 19, 2026, in St. Paul, Minnesota, 3M (NYSE: MMM) disclosed its plan to establish a joint venture aimed at delivering top-tier safety, fire-rescue, and suppression products for firefighters, first responders, and industrial workers. This venture signifies the company's commitment to providing enhanced solutions.

data.title: Lindsay Corporation Announces Second Quarter Fiscal 2026 Earnings Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: Lindsay Corporation, a prominent global manufacturer and distributor of irrigation and infrastructure equipment and technology, is set to disclose its financial results for the fiscal 2026 second quarter that concluded on February 28, 2026. The announcement is scheduled to be made prior to the market opening on Thursday, April 2, 2026. The conference will be headed by the company's management team, featuring Randy Wood, the President and Chief Executive Officer, along with Sam Hinrichsen, the Senior Vice President and Chief Financial Officer. The corporation is listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol LNN.

data.title: Movado Group, Inc. Announces Fourth Quarter and Fiscal Year 2026 Results
data.description: Movado Group, Inc. revealed its fourth quarter and fiscal year 2026 results, covering the period up to January 31, 2026. In Fiscal Year 2026, the company reported notable figures, including net sales totaling $671.3 million, a rise from $653.4 million in Fiscal Year 2025. Operating income also showed growth, reaching $29.8 million compared to $20.0 million the previous year. Adjusted operating income stood at $34.8 million in Fiscal Year 2026, a significant increase from $27.1 million in Fiscal Year 2025.
